diagrams.title: BST Operations Time Complexity
diagrams.description: Shows time complexity comparison for search, insert, delete operations in best, average and worst cases
elements: Best Case O(1) - element at root
Average Case O(log n) - balanced tree
diagrams.purpose: Understand when BST operations are efficient vs inefficient

diagrams.title: BST Deletion Cases
diagrams.description: Three scenarios when deleting a node from BST: leaf node, node with one child, node with two children
elements: Case 2: One child - bypass the node
Case 3: Two children - replace with inorder successor
diagrams.purpose: Visualize different deletion strategies in BST

diagrams.title: BST vs Skewed Tree Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison of balanced BST (pyramid shape) vs skewed BST (diagonal line)
elements: Balanced: height = log n, operations O(log n)
